microsoft_ft: Owned and executed Azure's recovery validation program end-to-end, scaling from a **2-person operation** to a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual resilience drills and delivering **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining program requirements and **self-service scheduling capabilities** that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, consistently repeatable model across teams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in **4 months at a 94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new standard for continuous, scalable validation across the org.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead and **primary stakeholder point of contact** for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring seamless cross-functional coordination.

Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring coordination workflows to reduce planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, improving operational efficiency and consistency across a high-volume program.

Managed vendor and partner integrations across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp, coordinating logistics, scheduling, and communications to ensure **cohesive, on-time execution** of joint resilience programs with zero missed milestones.

Identified and implemented process improvements across onboarding new drill participants, creating scalable intake workflows and **standardized runbooks** that reduced ramp time for new team members and ensured consistent program execution at scale.
microsoft_2023: Championed **program adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, running user demos and training sessions that drove consistent utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** through scalable, repeatable enablement processes.

Served as the primary point of contact for Azure service teams during a tooling transition, facilitating **11+ structured user interviews** to surface critical feature gaps and directly influence roadmap prioritization toward intent-based YAML generation.

Improved **onboarding and knowledge-access experience** for engineering teams by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and reducing friction for new hires.

Triaged and coordinated incoming requests from 14+ Azure service teams, managing a high-volume intake process with **timely, high-quality responses** and ensuring cross-functional partners stayed unblocked throughout the program lifecycle.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across **140+ teams** on a unified automation prioritization framework, generating $3M in accelerated revenue and launching Azure regions 28% faster by driving consistent, scalable execution across a complex stakeholder landscape.

Conducted discovery interviews with 20+ service teams to map **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch, then built a prioritized roadmap to automate critical paths — reducing operational toil and creating a more consistent, repeatable onboarding experience for each new region.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and make data-driven decisions with clear, consistently maintained program visibility.

Partnered cross-functionally with engineering, operations, and product teams to align on process improvements, facilitating working sessions that drove **stakeholder buy-in** and ensured scalable, organized execution of the region launch automation initiative.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, ensuring a seamless, well-coordinated transition for all cross-functional stakeholders.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, managing a prioritized backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process — maintaining consistent, organized execution across a fast-paced program.

Served as the **cross-functional coordination lead** between IT, Operations, and Engineering teams to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual effort across recurring operational workflows.

Identified process improvement opportunities across the migration program, documenting scalable runbooks and **standardized procedures** that improved consistency and reduced onboarding time for new team members joining the rollout mid-cycle.
pro_painters: Owned the **end-to-end onboarding lifecycle** for 200+ monthly client proposals, managing CRM workflows, scoping, and invoicing processes that increased job bookings by 26% through more organized, consistently executed operational procedures.

Served as the primary point of contact for client intake and proposal coordination, triaging high-volume requests and ensuring **timely, high-quality follow-through** across every stage of the customer journey from first contact to signed contract.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to create a more seamless and engaging experience for prospective customers.

Conducted financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks and improve leadership pricing models, delivering data-driven recommendations that increased consistency and efficiency across the business.

Identified and implemented process improvements to the CRM intake workflow, creating scalable templates and **standardized procedures** that reduced proposal turnaround time and enabled the team to handle growing request volume without adding headcount.

tailoring_notes: 'Seamless onboarding experience' (JD: 'ensuring seamless execution of our NHO programs') woven into microsoft_ft bullet#1 and amazon_robotics bullet#1 to mirror Axon's core program framing.

'Primary point of contact' (JD: 'Serve as a primary point of contact for onboarding') used verbatim in microsoft_ft bullet#4 and pro_painters bullet#2 to directly echo the role's coordination mandate.

'High-volume intake / triage' (JD: 'Manage the L&D inbox, triaging requests and ensuring timely, high-quality responses') surfaced in microsoft_2023 bullet#4 and pro_painters bullet#2 to demonstrate inbox and request-management experience.

'Scalable, consistent, repeatable' (JD: 'processes are organized, scalable, and consistently executed') threaded through microsoft_ft bullet#2, amazon_robotics bullet#4, and pro_painters bullet#5 to reflect Axon's operational excellence language.

'Vendor coordination' (JD: 'Coordinate and oversee vendor partnerships, including scheduling, logistics, and communication') directly addressed in microsoft_ft bullet#6 with scheduling, logistics, and communications framing matching the JD nearly verbatim.
